title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 15 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 15 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 15 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 15/11/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 0.99 % today, the main contract closed at 971.5. The steel mills are not active to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is general. PBF at Shandong port deal 985-1002 yuan/mt, PBF at Tangshan port deal 1000-1005 yuan/ mt.
